sourceStatus.publicationPolicy: No long SEC source text is embedded; evidence uses short digests and source URL anchors.

summaryKo.oneLine: Adobe FY26 Q2 사상 최고 매출 달성, AI-first ARR 전년 대비 3배 이상 성장

keyPoints.text: FY26 2분기 매출은 66억 2,000만 달러로 전년 대비 13% 성장하며 사상 최고치를 기록했다. AI 수요가 모든 고객 그룹에 걸쳐 성장을 견인했으며, 회사는 FY26 연간 매출 및 non-GAAP EPS 목표를 상향 조정했다.
AI-first ARR이 전년 대비 3배 이상 성장하며 5억 달러를 초과했다. Total ARR은 271억 달러로 확대됐으며, 이는 AI 제품 채택 가속화를 반영한다.
GAAP EPS는 4.25달러였으며, 영업 현금흐름은 21억 7,000만 달러를 기록했다. 자사주 약 850만 주를 매입해 주주환원도 지속했다.

riskChanges.text: GAAP 실적에는 Publishing & Advertising 보고 단위 관련 주당 0.17달러의 비현금 영업권 손상 비용이 반영됐다.

businessChanges.text: 총 구독 매출은 63억 9,000만 달러로 전년 대비 14% 성장했으며, Semrush 인수 효과 약 4,000만 달러가 포함됐다. Business Professionals & Consumers 구독 매출은 18억 5,000만 달러였다.
분기 말 RPO(잔여 이행 의무)는 222억 7,000만 달러였으며, 현재 RPO(cRPO) 비율은 67%였다.
Q3 FY26 가이던스: 총 매출 66억 7,000만~67억 2,000만 달러를 제시하며 성장 모멘텀 지속을 시사했다.

financialHighlights.text: FY26 Q2 매출 66억 2,000만 달러(YoY +13%), AI 수요 기반 사상 최고치.
GAAP EPS 4.25달러; GAAP 기준에는 0.17달러 영업권 손상비 포함, non-GAAP 순이익 24억 달러.
영업 현금흐름 21억 7,000만 달러로 견조한 현금 창출력 유지.
Total ARR 271억 달러, AI-first ARR 5억 달러 초과(전년 대비 3배 이상).

watchItems.text: AI-first ARR 성장 속도가 Q3에도 이어지는지, Semrush 통합 효과가 구독 매출에 얼마나 더 기여하는지 확인이 필요하다.
Publishing & Advertising 사업부 영업권 손상이 추가 자산 재평가로 이어질지 여부와 그 규모를 다음 분기에 점검해야 한다.

evidence.sourceTextDigest: EX-99.1 2 adbeex991q226.htm EX-99.1 Document Exhibit 99.1 Investor Relations Contact Doug Clark Adobe ir@adobe.com Public Relations Contact Ashley Levine Adobe adobepr@adobe.com FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE Adobe Reports Record Q2 Results • Adobe Raises FY26 Total Revenue and Non-GAAP EPS Targets • AI-first ARR triples year over year and exceeds $500 million SAN JOSE, Calif. – June 11, 2026 – Adobe (Nasdaq:ADBE), the global technology leader that unleashes creativity and productivity for individuals and businesses through innovative platforms and tools, today reported financial results for its second quarter FY2026 ended May 29, 2026. “Adobe delivered record revenue of $6.62 billion in Q2 reflecting strong AI-driven demand across our customer groups and we are raising our full-year fiscal 2026 revenue and non-GAAP EPS targets on the strength of that performance,” said Shantanu  Normalized numeric aliases: $500 million = 5억 달러; $6.62 billion = 66억 2,000만 달러; $500 = 500달러; $6.62 = 6.62달러.

CEO, Adobe. “We are inspired to bring the magic of our new AI products to consumers, business professionals, creators, and marketers to deliver on our mission to Empower Everyone to Create.” Second Quarter FY2026 Financial Highlights • Adobe achieved record revenue of $6.62 billion in its second quarter of FY2026, which represents 13% year-over-year growth, or 11% in constant currency. • Diluted earnings per share was $4.25 on a GAAP basis and $5.96 on a non-GAAP basis. GAAP results reflect a $0.17 per share non-cash goodwill impairment charge related to the Publishing & Advertising reporting unit. • Total Adobe Annualized Recurring Revenue (“ARR”) exiting  Normalized numeric aliases: $6.62 billion = 66억 2,000만 달러; $27.10 billion = 271억 달러; $480 million = 4억 8,000만 달러; $2.24 billion = 22억 4,000만 달러; $2.95 billion = 29억 5,000만 달러; $1.71 billion = 17억 1,000만 달러; $6.62 = 6.62달러; $4.25 = 4.25달러; $0.17 = 0.17달러; $1.71 = 1.71달러; $27.10 = 27.10달러; $480 = 480달러; $2.24 = 2.24달러; $2.95 = 2.95달러.

non-GAAP net income was $2.40 billion. • Cash flows from operations were $2.17 billion. • Exiting the quarter, Remaining Performance Obligations (“RPO”) were $22.27 billion, and Current Remaining Performance Obligations (“cRPO”) were 67%. • Adobe repurchased approximately 8.5 million shares during the quarter. Second Quarter FY2026 Customer Group Highlights • Total Customer Group subscription revenue was $6.39 billion, which represents 14% year-over-year growth, or 12% in constant currency, including approximately $40 million from Semrush. • Business Professionals & Consumers subscription revenue was $1.85 billion, which represents 16%  Normalized numeric aliases: $2.40 billion = 24억 달러; $2.17 billion = 21억 7,000만 달러; $22.27 billion = 222억 7,000만 달러; 8.5 million = 850만 달러; $6.39 billion = 63억 9,000만 달러; $40 million = 4,000만 달러; $1.85 billion = 18억 5,000만 달러; $4.54 billion = 45억 4,000만 달러; $2.17 = 2.17달러; $4.54 = 4.54달러; $22.27 = 22.27달러; $6.39 = 6.39달러; $40 = 40달러; $1.85 = 1.85달러.

of Semrush Holdings, Inc. and assume current macroeconomic conditions. The following table summarizes Adobe’s third quarter FY2026 targets: Total revenue $6.67 billion to $6.72 billion Business Professionals & Consumers subscription revenue $1.87 billion to $1.89 billion Creative & Marketing Professionals subscription revenue $4.61 billion to $4.64 billion Earnings per share 1 GAAP: $4.40 to $4.45 Non-GAAP: $6.05 to $6.10 1 Targets assume non-GAAP operating margin of ~44.0%, GAAP tax rate of ~23.0%, non-GAAP tax rate of ~18.0% and diluted share count of ~395  Normalized numeric aliases: $6.67 billion = 66억 7,000만 달러; $6.72 billion = 67억 2,000만 달러; $1.87 billion = 18억 7,000만 달러; $1.89 billion = 18억 9,000만 달러; $4.61 billion = 46억 1,000만 달러; $4.64 billion = 46억 4,000만 달러; 395 million = 3억 9,500만 달러; $26.50 billion = 265억 달러; $7.44 billion = 74억 4,000만 달러; $6.72 = 6.72달러; $4.40 = 4.40달러; $26.60 = 26.60달러; $26.50 = 26.50달러; $7.44 = 7.44달러; $7.48 = 7.48달러; $18.21 = 18.21달러; $18.27 = 18.27달러.
